description: The DesktopController component is used to control the desktop through the game dash.

fields.FollowCursor: whether the desktop cursor should follow the Resonite dash cursor when not clicking.
fields.LegacyInputMode: Whether to use the legacy input system for desktop interaction.
fields.Brightness: how bright the desktop display should be in the dash.
fields.Opacity: how transparent the desktop display should be in the dash.
fields._displayColor: The color of the display texture to drive
fields._displayRect: The UIX size rectangle for the display texture.
fields._interactionRelay: The relay allowing for system Desktop interaction.
fields._currentControl: The current dialogue being used to change settings for this component.
